def test_main_script_execution():
        # Run the script and write output to output.log
        with open(LOG_FILE, "w") as f:
            result = subprocess.run(
                ["python3", "main.py"],
                cwd=PROJECT_DIR,
                stdout=f,
                stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
                text=True
            )
